articles.title: 2026 Emmy nominations: Full list of nominees, including a record-breaking comedy
articles.description:
HBO Max's emergency room drama “The Pitt” led all nominees with 25 in a dominant sophomore season, while HBO's “Hacks” got a graduation party with a record-setting 24 to lead all comedies in its final season.

The post 2026 Emmy nominations: Full list of nominees, including a record-breaking comedy appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: HBO Max's 'The Pitt' received 25 Emmy nominations, showcasing Boston's growing influence in television.
'Hacks' earned 24 nominations, marking a record for comedies in its final season.
Local viewers can expect increased engagement with Emmy-winning content from Boston-based productions.

articles.title: Boston sues social media companies over ‘addictive’ features, joining nationwide litigation
articles.description:
Boston officials say that social media has led to a significant downturn in the mental health of students over the past decade.

The post Boston sues social media companies over ‘addictive’ features, joining nationwide litigation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston files a lawsuit against social media companies for harmful addictive features.
Officials cite a decade-long decline in student mental health linked to social media use.
The lawsuit aims to protect Boston youth from negative mental health impacts.

articles.title: Cyclospora, the explosive diarrhea parasite, has reached Mass. Here’s what to know.
articles.description:
Massachusetts is among more than a dozen states with documented cases of cyclosporiasis, a stomach-churning parasitic infection spread through food or water.

The post Cyclospora, the explosive diarrhea parasite, has reached Mass. Here’s what to know. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts reports cases of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection affecting local residents.
Over a dozen states, including Massachusetts, have documented cases of this infection.
Residents should be cautious about food and water sources to avoid infection.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown says he and Patriots WR A.J. Brown are cousins
articles.description:
"His grandfather is brothers with my grandfather," Jaylen Brown said of A.J. Brown.

summary: Jaylen Brown confirms he is cousins with Patriots WR A.J. Brown.

This familial link may enhance community engagement among Boston sports fans.

articles.title: Carles Gil selected for 2026 MLS All-Star roster

The Revolution captain is set for his fifth All-Star appearance.

summary: Carles Gil named to 2026 MLS All-Star roster for fifth time.

articles.title: Boston’s pro women’s baseball team, set to begin play in August, has a name
articles.description:
"The WPBL stands on the shoulders of these incredible women who fought for their place in history and on the diamond long before us."

summary: Boston's new pro women's baseball team will debut in August 2026.

Local fans can support women's sports and foster community engagement.

articles.title: Plaintiff for anti-vaccine group’s suit is charged with murder of her twins
articles.description:
A lawsuit filed by Children’s Health Defense, an organization founded by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., claims that vaccines caused the twins’ deaths. But a grand jury in Idaho has indicted her on charges of suffocating them.

The post Plaintiff for anti-vaccine group’s suit is charged with murder of her twins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Idaho grand jury indicted anti-vaccine plaintiff on murder charges for suffocating her twins.
Children’s Health Defense, founded by Robert F. Kennedy Jr., filed a lawsuit claiming vaccine link.
Boston residents may face increased scrutiny on anti-vaccine sentiments following this high-profile case.

articles.title: Some thoughts on the Jaylen Brown trade, and how the Celtics move forward without him
articles.description:
There were two questions that I wanted Celtics president of basketball operations Brad Stevens to answer during his press conference, alongside owner Bill Chisholm.

The post Some thoughts on the Jaylen Brown trade, and how the Celtics move forward without him appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics president Brad Stevens addressed the team's future post-Jaylen Brown trade on July 8.
Owner Bill Chisholm joined Stevens in discussing strategic changes for the upcoming season.
Boston residents may see shifts in team dynamics and player roles affecting local fan engagement.

articles.title: Massachusetts man who fell ill in Fiji dies
articles.description:
The Holbrook man fell critically ill while sailing through the South Pacific on a once-in-a-lifetime journey beginning in April.

The post Massachusetts man who fell ill in Fiji dies appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Holbrook resident fell critically ill while sailing in Fiji, starting his journey in April.
The man, whose name has not been disclosed, died during his trip in early July.
His death raises concerns about safety for local sailors and travelers in remote areas.

articles.title: The Brigham and Women’s Hospital nurses strike is underway. Here’s what to know.
articles.description:
More than 4,000 nurses were expected to walk off the job in what could become the largest nurses strike in Massachusetts history.

The post The Brigham and Women’s Hospital nurses strike is underway. Here’s what to know. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Over 4,000 nurses at Brigham and Women's Hospital are on strike as of July 8, 2026.
This strike could become the largest nurses strike in Massachusetts history.
Local patients may face delays in care and services during the strike.
